meta.title: Avalo | Web Development & Enterprise AI Automation
meta.description: Avalo engineering studio: web design & development, enterprise AI automation, AI customer service. Transparent fixed pricing, order online, deployment and long-term care included.

hero.label: Engineering · Design · Automation
hero.desc: From brand websites and revenue-ready e-commerce to enterprise AI automation and intelligent support — one engineer, end-to-end: design, build, deploy, maintain. Every price published. No haggling.

services.label: Core Services
services.intro: I'm a full-stack engineer — no outsourcing, no middlemen. The person you talk to is the person who builds, ships, and maintains. I also cover what the market underserves: LINE OA AI support, report automation, and AI search optimization (getting ChatGPT to recommend your business).

items.name: Web Design & Development
items.desc: Fully custom design, responsive layouts, SEO, payments and admin dashboards — websites that bring customers and orders, not just pretty facades.

items.name: Enterprise AI Automation
items.desc: AI customer service, workflow automation, auto-generated reports. Hand repetitive work to systems — the labor saved pays it back within a year.

items.name: Systems & Custom Development
items.desc: Membership systems, ERP/POS integration, API development, data engineering. When off-the-shelf software can't do it, I build it.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.intro: Each price comes with the Taiwan market range so you can compare yourself. When you're ready, add to cart and order online — no back-and-forth negotiation, no hidden extras.
pricing.notice:
✦ All plans include: discovery call, design approval, testing & launch
✦ Prices exclude 5% VAT, added at checkout
✦ Builds include first month of care; subscriptions cancellable anytime

custom.label: Enterprise
custom.name: Custom System Development
custom.desc: Membership systems, ERP integration, high-traffic architecture, AI products — larger custom projects get a written fixed quote after a free consultation. The quote is final too.

cases.label: Selected Work
cases.intro: No concept mockups, no fake screenshots. Every project below was built by me and is running in production — click through and verify.

items.name: JeanToGo
items.label: JEAN
items.desc: Uber Eats partner onboarding platform helping restaurants across Taiwan apply for delivery partnership: online application flow, document guidance, and merchant onboarding content built for non-technical owners.

items.name: GT Club Taiwan
items.label: GT
items.desc: Membership community site with three topic hubs (AI, Web3, sustainability), member application forms, categorized newsletter subscriptions, an event photo wall, and light/dark themes.

items.name: Damen KYT
items.label: KYT
items.desc: Blockchain security and compliance platform — a Know Your Transaction (KYT) risk-screening SaaS helping businesses meet crypto compliance requirements. Built as a React SPA.

items.name: AG Agent — Meeting Assistant
items.label: AG
items.desc: An internal AI agent that automatically captures, summarizes, and answers questions about weekly meeting records — semantic search over past decisions, built with Next.js + RAG.

items.name: Bilingual Portfolio Site
items.label: TH
items.desc: Bilingual (zh/en) portfolio for a Web3/AI full-stack engineer: modular content architecture, instant language switching, interactive browsing experience.

about.label: About Avalo
about.p1: Avalo is a one-person engineering studio. I'm a full-stack engineer focused on web, AI, and data engineering — every project above was architected, built, deployed, and maintained by me personally.
about.p2: Working with me means no telephone game between sales and developers. You talk directly to the person doing the work: faster understanding, cheaper changes, and someone to call when things break.

features.title: Fixed prices, published first
features.desc: Every standard service is priced on this site with the market range alongside. No worrying about being overcharged, no time wasted negotiating.

features.title: Talk directly to the engineer
features.desc: No sales layer, no subcontracting. The person scoping your project writes the code — feasibility and timelines get answered on the spot.

features.title: Deployment & security included
features.desc: Every build ships to production with HTTPS, firewall, and security hardening — you don't just get a zip file and a goodbye.

features.title: Long-term care is the commitment
features.desc: Monthly care plans keep your site looked after: backups, updates, monitoring, changes. You run the business; I run the systems.

contact.label: Start a Project
contact.intro: Standard services can be ordered online directly. For custom projects — or if you're not sure what you need — fill in the form for a free consultation. Replies within 24 hours.

form.title: Free Consultation
form.subtitle: INQUIRY FORM · Reply within 24h
form.name: Name *
form.messagePh: Briefly describe your needs, goals, timeline, or anything you'd like me to know…
form.success: Got it! I'll reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.tagline: Web Development · Enterprise AI Automation · Systems Integration

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Browse the pricing section and pick what you need.
cart.monthlyNote: Subscriptions are charged monthly by credit card after authorization (incl. tax)

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name *
checkout.emailNote: Order confirmation and lookup use this email
checkout.notePh: Anything you'd like me to know up front — requirements, timeline…
checkout.payHint: You'll be redirected to ECPay's secure page. If your order has both one-time and subscription items, you'll complete two authorizations in sequence.
checkout.agreement: I have read and agree to the
checkout.error: Failed to create order. Please check the fields and retry.

order.successDesc: Your order is confirmed and a receipt has been emailed to you. I'll reach out within 24 hours to start the discovery call.
order.pendingDesc: If you chose ATM / convenience store payment, the order will update automatically once payment clears.
order.failDesc: The transaction failed or was cancelled. Feel free to order again or contact me for help.
order.lookupDesc: Enter your order number and the email used at checkout.
order.lookupNotFound: Order not found. Please check the number and email.
